Modal dialog that displays basic information about the application, its author and the resources used during development.

Creates the about dialog centered relative to its parent window.
addMediaPollingListener(MediaPollingListener) - Method in class gelabert.ytdlgui.MediaPollingComponent
Registers a listener that will be notified when new media is discovered.
ApiClient - Class in gelabert.ytdlgui
HTTP client wrapper for the DI Media NET backend.
ApiClient(String) - Constructor for class gelabert.ytdlgui.ApiClient
Creates a client configured for the given backend base URL.

MainFrame - Class in gelabert.ytdlgui
Main application window.
MainFrame() - Constructor for class gelabert.ytdlgui.MainFrame
Builds the main frame, initializes all panels and configures the initial UI state.
MainPanel - Class in gelabert.ytdlgui
Main downloader panel where the user pastes a URL and starts the download flow.
MainPanel() - Constructor for class gelabert.ytdlgui.MainPanel
Creates the main downloader panel and configures the initial interaction rules.
Media - Class in gelabert.ytdlgui
Data transfer object that represents one media entry returned by the backend API.
Media() - Constructor for class gelabert.ytdlgui.Media

Local representation of a media file shown in the media library.

Screen used to show the media library loaded from the backend or local state.

Creates new form MediaLibraryPanel
MediaLibraryPanel(MainFrame) - Constructor for class gelabert.ytdlgui.MediaLibraryPanel
 
mediaMimeType - Variable in class gelabert.ytdlgui.Media
 
MediaPollingComponent - Class in gelabert.ytdlgui
Reusable Swing component that wraps ApiClient and performs periodic polling for newly added media in the DI Media NET backend.
MediaPollingComponent() - Constructor for class gelabert.ytdlgui.MediaPollingComponent
Creates the polling component, initializes its label and prepares the Swing timer.
MediaPollingEvent - Class in gelabert.ytdlgui
Event fired when the polling component detects newly added media items.
MediaPollingEvent(Object, List<Media>, OffsetDateTime) - Constructor for class gelabert.ytdlgui.MediaPollingEvent
Creates a new polling event.
MediaPollingListener - Interface in gelabert.ytdlgui
Listener notified whenever MediaPollingComponent discovers new media.
MediaTableModel - Class in gelabert.ytdlgui
Swing table model used to render media items inside the library table.
MediaTableModel(List<MediaFile>) - Constructor for class gelabert.ytdlgui.MediaTableModel
